top_blast: Bifunctional arginine demethylase and lysyl-hydroxylase PSR (3); Bifunctional arginine demethylase and lysyl-hydroxylase JMJD6 (2); Arginine-specific demethylase JMJ22 (1)
top_pfam: JmjC (5; JmjC; bestE=7.6E-10); Cupin_8 (1; Cupin-like; bestE=3E-10)
